verified_fixed.title: Drum instrument mislabeled as melodic patch in rack row
verified_fixed.note: Row reads 'Tulip ch1 TR-808 kit'. shellmodel.instrument_sound() drum branch works.

verified_fixed.title: Duplicate instrument names / no rename / no editor identity
verified_fixed.note: Unique default names (Tulip / Tulip 2), Name field with rename, breadcrumb shows instrument name. But see H2: the Name field renders clipped.

verified_fixed.title: Auto-picked free MIDI channel on add/move
verified_fixed.note: Second instrument landed on Channel 2 automatically.

findings.title: Settings crashes on open; entire Settings surface unreachable
findings.summary: Tap System > Settings: screen flashes and bounces back to System with no visible error. Panel build throws AttributeError: 'module' object has no attribute 'volume' at settings.py:91 (live=amy.volume). On current firmware amy has only MAX_VOLUME; tulip.volume does not exist either (verified on device). Introduced by commit 97e2be9c which moved the amy.volume reference from a drag callback to build time.
evidence: serial traceback captured in review; no screenshot possible (screen never builds)
findings.suggested_fix: Use the volume API the pinned amy actually exposes (check amy pin da8b914; likely amy.send(volume=v) or equivalent). Never dereference optional module attributes at panel-build time; guard with getattr and degrade to a disabled slider. Smoke-test: every screen must open once on-device before merge.

findings.title: Interrupt-watchdog reboot on ordinary navigation (the 'drops back to Home' glitch); decklog cannot capture it
findings.summary: Reproduced: editor > MPE > Per-note expression > Back > Back > FX Edit in quick succession hard-rebooted the device (uptime reset; deck.log tail only '=== deck boot ===' markers). User lands on Home after boot = the reported glitch. WDT resets never run Python again so file logging is structurally blind to the cause. Second sighting across two review sessions (review 5 saw one during a patch-search rebuild).
findings.suggested_fix: 1) Log machine.reset_cause() (and ESP-IDF reset reason) inside the boot marker so WDT resets are identifiable in deck.log. 2) Chunk heavy panel builds (FX/Sound/MPE editors) across multiple tulip.defer ticks, or feed the WDT during rebuild. 3) Consider caching built panels and re-parenting instead of full rebuild on back().
findings.status: new (root cause of known user report)

findings.title: Text fields render clipped text: Name field content half-cut at bottom; search placeholder clipped at top and low-contrast
findings.summary: Name field shows 'Tulip' cut in half at the field's bottom edge on every editor. Patch-search placeholder 'search patches' is clipped at the top edge and rendered dim orange-brown on purple (fails contrast); typed text renders fine. Same tulip.UIText vertical-metrics bug family as review-5 L1; the bigger field (60px) did not fix metrics, and the new Name field reintroduced the bug on a new surface.
findings.suggested_fix: Add one deckui helper wrapping tulip.UIText that vertically centers the textarea within its group and sets a legible placeholder color (>= dk.MUTED on SURFACE2); use it for search, Name, and Settings Wi-Fi fields.

findings.title: Rename writes full config to flash on every keystroke
findings.summary: rack._name_cb fires on VALUE_CHANGED per character and calls deckcfg.set_instrument which always save()s (full JSON serialize + flash write) on the keyboard event tick. Contradicts the same round's commit-on-release policy (97e2be9c) that exists because per-tick flash writes stall both cores and wear the config sector.
findings.suggested_fix: Per keystroke: update RAM cache only (set_instrument needs a flush=False param like set_instrument_param). Commit once on lv.EVENT.DEFOCUSED or READY (keyboard close).

findings.title: MPE panel: dependent controls look fully live while Enable MPE is off
findings.summary: With the master switch off, Member channels / Pitch bend / Listen channel / Per-note expression render full-color and interactive; only cue is tiny muted 'MPE off' bottom-left.
findings.suggested_fix: Add lv.STATE.DISABLED + reduced opacity to dependent cards while gate is off; move the on/off status text next to the switch.

findings.title: Rack enable-switch renders green on fresh build but blue after Back-refill rebuild
findings.summary: Fresh push: green (s02, s20). After back()'s deferred _schedule_refill rebuild: blue (s15, s17). rack.py:85 passes color=dk.GREEN in both cases. Green is the deck's 'enabled' color vocabulary; the flip-flop breaks state-color meaning on the primary toggle.
findings.suggested_fix: Debug why the INDICATOR|CHECKED style loses in the deferred-refill path; as a robust fallback set indicator color on PART.INDICATOR unconditionally (indicator only shows when checked on lv.switch).

findings.title: Search-as-you-type with keyboard up shows exactly one result row
findings.summary: Auto-popped keyboard covers bottom ~55%; results list does not resize, leaving one visible row between field and keys. Live-filter feedback (the feature's point) is mostly invisible while typing.
findings.suggested_fix: When ui.lv_soft_kb is present, shrink listbody height to end above the keyboard; restore on close (hook keyboard open/close or lv keyboard DELETE event).

findings.title: Unstyled firmware keyboard is design-system whiplash, now on the main path via autoshow
findings.suggested_fix: Restyle ui.lv_soft_kb (bg SURFACE, keys SURFACE2, accent checked) when opened from deck surfaces.

findings.title: Picker page title duplicates selected row and goes stale under filter
findings.suggested_fix: Stable heading ('Juno-6 patches'); selection lives on the highlighted row only.

findings.title: 'Drum machine (legacy)' tile clipped at both ends
findings.suggested_fix: Rename to 'Drums (legacy)'.

findings.title: System/Apps submenu grids cluster top-left; ~70% dead panel
findings.suggested_fix: Apply the root grid's centered flex_align to submenus.

findings.title: Files: footer actions look enabled with no selection; off-palette colors; divergent Back
findings.suggested_fix: Disable Run/Edit until selection; deck palette (accent/green/red); shell-style Back.

findings.title: Type change silently resets patch and Sound edits
findings.suggested_fix: Hint line on Type picker: 'Changing type resets the patch and sound edits.'

findings.title: Unitless values; nonzero-minimum params (duty 0.50 at far-left) read as broken sliders
findings.summary: oscA_duty range is 0.50-0.99 so knob-at-min with '0.50' is correct but indistinguishable from a broken slider. FX level/liveness/damping unitless. 'sub tune 440 Hz' proves units are supported.
findings.suggested_fix: Percent display for duty-type params; min/max microlabels at track ends; add units where known.

findings.title: 32KB internal-SRAM alloc failure logged when keyboard opens on patch picker
findings.summary: 'alloc failed size 32768 heap_caps_malloc internal 8bit' on keyboard open; keyboard still appeared via fallback. Memory headroom pressure on the hot path; related soil for H1.
findings.suggested_fix: Heap audit of picker path; consider windowing the patch list instead of building all rows.

findings.title: 'Kits' is a patch-collection name, not an instrument Type; 'Drums' was the correct type label
findings.suggested_fix: Type list: Juno-6 / DX7 / Piano / Drums. Keep 'Kit TR-808' as the patch-slot row label.

findings.title: Rack row stutters device name: 'Tulip / Tulip ch1 ...'
findings.suggested_fix: Omit device prefix in subtitle when instrument is on the internal device (or when it prefixes the name).

findings.title: Top-bar clock shows confident wrong time when clock never set
findings.suggested_fix: Show '--:--' (or hide) until time source exists.

findings.title: Reset-confirm backdrop dimming makes some tiles vanish entirely (RGB332 blend artifact)
findings.suggested_fix: Raise backdrop opacity (~230+) so background uniformly darkens.

findings.title: Min-value slider knob overflows card corner
findings.suggested_fix: Inset slider a few px within card.

findings.title: Inactive left-tab labels low contrast on purple
findings.suggested_fix: Lighten inactive tab text.

findings.title: ASCII '->' and '--' in user-facing copy
findings.suggested_fix: Reword or use real glyphs if font supports.

findings.title: Welcome step cards look tappable but are not; footer leaks run('welcome') REPL syntax
findings.suggested_fix: Either make cards tappable (jump to that step) or flatten card chrome; reword footer.

findings.title: Submenu tile label color drifts cream/yellow vs root white
findings.suggested_fix: Verify label color path; unify to WHITE.

structural.title: Make the rack the home screen; demote the launcher
structural.summary: Root screen currently spends 1024x544 on three abstract tiles + dead space while the state screen (rack) is a level down; the main performer loop (change my instrument's sound) takes 4 taps. Make rack.panel the root panel; Devices/System become top-bar icons or two small tiles; keep + Add instrument at bottom.
structural.priority: do after criticals; highest-value structural change

structural.title: Two-column editor layouts; kill the portrait-form-on-landscape anti-pattern
structural.summary: Editor rows are full-width cards with ~700px of dead space between left label and right control, forcing scroll. On 1024x600 the instrument editor fits without scrolling as two columns: left identity/routing (Name/Device/Channel/Voices), right sound (Type/Patch/Sound/FX/MPE), Remove full-width bottom. Same treatment for MPE and revived Settings.

structural.title: Fold Settings (then Files) into shell panels; retire standalone chrome for first-party tools
structural.summary: Settings/Files as separate tulip.run apps fork the chrome (divergent Back, L5) and bypass the shell's panel-error surface (why C1 bounces silently). Split Settings into Network/Display/Audio/System shell panels. Borrowed heavy apps (Editor, Wordpad, Tulip World) stay standalone.
structural.priority: optional third; pairs naturally with the C1 fix

structural.title: Explicitly keep: shell architecture, chips, confirm vocabulary, shellmodel test split, tabs+search patch picker
structural.summary: No full rewrite. The panel-stack shell and unit-tested shellmodel are sound; the picker needs M4/H2/L2, not a rethink.

modernization_2026.title: Add motion: 150-200ms ease-out slide/fade for panel push/pop, modal fade, switch thumb animation; add reduce-motion toggle
Icon pass: pair an LVGL symbol/glyph with every tile and nav row (8-10 glyphs total)
Show sound: live voice meter in the device chip, MIDI-activity flicker on instrument rows, audition indicator in pickers
Depth tokens: soft shadow or 1px border on cards + pressed 'sink' state
Typography axis: semibold titles, regular body, tabular/mono numerals for values
Home dashboard layer: now-playing patch, last MIDI device, volume in the dead lower half
